name: M365 Conditional Access Policies Disabled
description: Identifies Conditional Access policies that are in disabled or report-only state
query: SELECT id, display_name, state, created_datetime FROM entra_conditional_access_policies WHERE state IN ('disabled', 'enabledForReportingButNotEnforced')
remediation: Review disabled Conditional Access policies. Enable policies that should be enforced or document why they are disabled.
